text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, all. I believe you have heard the
results by now...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But allow me to announce the results of the fan
poll for this year's Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The honor of this year's number one spot goes
to...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black. Congratulations. May you race
your best on the track.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the official announcement of the Takarazuka
Kinen's voting results, Tracen Academy goes wild.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: We did it, Trainer! We really did it!
choice_data_list: You're the most popular Umamusume now!
You're the most popular Umamusume now!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I am... and I couldn't have done it without you!
You helped me train and improve slowly but
surely!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Nobody would even give me a second glance
back then, but now... I've got all these fans
cheering for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to all her fans' support, Kitasan Black can
advance to the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best today, Brusquement!

text_block_list.name: Brusquement
text_block_list.text: ...Sure.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Last spring's jitters are back...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You know what, Trainer? I get the feeling I'll get
answers to things I've never been able to
understand if I run right now.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, like what about Brusquement makes her so
strong, and how I stack up against her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What aspects I've caught up to her on, and which
ones I haven't. I'll have to work hard to reach her
level on the things I'm still behind on...
choice_data_list:
We have to be aware of what you don't need to
work on as well.

We have to be aware of what you don't need to
work on as well.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wait, what I don't have to work on?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to Kitasan Black how each Umamusume
has their own unique characteristics, but their
quirks aren't what make or break them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to try to match Brusquement in
what she's good at. All Kitasan Black must do is
polish her own strengths.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That is sound advice. Your trainer is correct.
Umamusume all have different origins, and it's
critical to locate that point in ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We must understand ourselves at the deepest
level and discover the meaning of the blood
flowing in our veins.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: It's meaning...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes. You must maximize the potential of the
legacy you carry. Only by doing that can you
reach your final form and reach the epitome of
glory.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Show me what you've got today, Kitasan Black.
Show me what meaning lies within your blood.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Let me see just how much potential you have
hidden inside you in your race against
Brusquement.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This will be their first battle since entering their
senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, they'll be able to see just what their rival
is really made of.
